data.title: Jefferies strategist: Bitcoin removed from portfolio due to concerns about quantum computing risks.
data.description: In his latest "Greed & Fear" market newsletter, Jefferies strategist Christopher Wood stated that he has completely removed Bitcoin from his flagship portfolio due to growing concerns that advances in quantum computing could jeopardize the long-term security of cryptocurrencies. His initial 10% Bitcoin allocation, first added at the end of 2020, has been replaced by a combined position in physical gold and gold mining stocks. Wood added that breakthroughs in quantum computing will weaken Bitcoin's role as a reliable store of value for pension investors. If the timeline for quantum technology is shortened, some capital allocators will now question Bitcoin's value-store properties. Furthermore, cryptographic attacks may occur sooner than expected, allowing attackers to derive private keys from exposed public keys, thereby undermining the cryptography that underpins Bitcoin balances and mining rewards and challenging its role as "digital gold" for pension portfolios. (Bloomberg)

data.title: PRIVA will launch a privacy policy, with revenue used for dividends and buybacks.
data.description: According to official sources, PRIVA will launch its privacy protocol tonight. Protocol fees will be used to distribute USDT/ETH dividends to nodes and to buy back and burn $PRV, implementing a "real return + deflationary" economic model.

data.description: According to market sources, billionaire Jon Yarbrough has disclosed that he currently holds $32.4 million worth of Bitcoin.

data.title: Dogecoin Flirts With An Inverse Head And Shoulders: $0.15 Break Is The Trigger
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) is trying to base on higher timeframes as Cantonese Cat points to a potential inverse head-and-shoulders on the daily, with price compressing just beneath a defined resistance shelf while holding a nearby demand zone. Dogecoin Breakout Could Target $0. 19 In a daily chart (DOGE/USD, Binance) shared via X on Jan. 16, Cantonese Cat overlays an inverse head-and-shoulders schematic: a left shoulder in early December, a deeper “head” into late December near the mid-$0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin-flirts-with-an-inverse-hs-0-15-trigger/

data.title: Upbit revealed that XRP will be the most traded digital asset in South Korea in 2025.
data.description: According to South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Upbit, XRP became the most traded digital asset on its platform in 2025, with a cumulative trading volume exceeding $1 trillion, surpassing the trading volume of other top cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin.

data.title: A certain whale has bought 8,337 XAUTs in the past 20 days, worth $38.4 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale is using revolving lending to buy tokenized gold, having purchased 8,337 XAUT tokens in the past 20 days, worth $38.4 million.

data.title: Analysis: Crypto market awaits bullish catalyst; Bitcoin volatility falls to four-month low.
data.description: Data shows that Bitcoin's annualized 30-day implied volatility has fallen below 40%, reaching its lowest level since October 5th. The US Senate Banking Committee's postponement of discussion on the market structure bill has become one of the most watched focuses in the crypto market this week. Some analysts warn that failure to pass the bill could trigger a crypto winter. Meanwhile, US-listed spot ETFs saw net inflows of $1.81 billion this week, the largest weekly inflow since October. Deribit executive Sidrah Fariq stated that market sentiment remains cautious but constructive, and a clear bullish catalyst may be needed for the next phase of upward movement. They are awaiting a clear catalyst and additional positive factors for a sustained upward breakout. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Futures will launch SPORTFUNUSDT and AIAUSDT USDT U-margined perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch perpetual contracts at the following times: January 16, 2026, 21:45 (UTC+8): SPORTFUNUSDT perpetual contract, with a maximum leverage of 20x; January 16, 2026, 22:00 (UTC+8): AIAUSDT perpetual contract, with a maximum leverage of 20x.

data.title: "1011 Insider Whale" Agent: ETH is an optimizer for corporate balance sheets in a long cycle.
data.description: Garrett Jin, an agent for "1011 Insider Whale," stated on the X platform that for businesses, buying ETH at $3,000 and pledging it with a fixed annualized yield of 3% would yield a 9% annualized USD pledging return if the price rises to $9,000. Even if the price falls (unlikely), the long-term pledging returns can offset fiat currency losses. For institutions and businesses (such as Bitmine), ETH is a balance sheet optimizer in a long-term cycle; its high growth and technological characteristics allow its valuation to race against time, much like AI stocks with high P/E ratios today.

data.title: Dreamcash launches USDT0 collateralized RWA perpetual contracts on Hyperliquid
data.description: Mobile trading platform Dreamcash has announced a partnership with Tether and Selini Capital to launch a series of RWA-based HIP-3 perpetual contract markets on Hyperliquid, which will use USDT0 as collateral.

data.title: The founder of the Life K-line project stated that the number of whitelisted tokens has been confirmed to be 6, which will be repurchased and burned during the next website update.
data.description: The founder of the Life K-line project, “0xSakura Sakura”, posted on the X platform that the Life K-line merit donation and daily fortune prediction functions have been deployed to the webpage. The whitelist tokens have been determined through grok analysis, and the number of whitelist tokens is confirmed to be 6. They will be repurchased and burned during the next website update. The allocation ratio for the first repurchase will be based on the weighted data in the grok analysis, and will be updated every time thereafter.

data.title: Prediction Markets Face Regulatory Crossroads as Legal Battles Intensify
data.description:
Prediction markets are not new, but their rapid expansion over the past two years has pushed them into largely uncharted regulatory territory, according to a recent report by Clear Street analyst Owen Lau.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/prediction-markets-face-regulatory-crossroads-as-legal-battles-intensify/

data.title: Kaito AI Announces Domain Transition
data.description: According to Odaily, Kaito AI has officially announced the transition of its website from 'yaps.kaito.ai' to 'kaito.ai'. During this period, the site will experience a brief downtime. Once the migration is complete, the previous domain will redirect to the new one.

data.title: Vanguard Group Mid-Cap Index Fund Acquires Strategy Stocks
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on January 16, Vanguard Group Mid-Cap Index Fund Institutional Shares (VMCIX) disclosed its initial purchase of Strategy stocks, acquiring a total of 2.91 million shares valued at approximately $505 million.

data.title: Coinbase expects to gradually roll out stock tokenization trading to all users in the coming weeks.
data.description: In a recent interview, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong stated that although Coinbase entered the stock market relatively late, the company is making long-term strategic moves. He said that Coinbase, with its deep cryptocurrency expertise and the most trusted crypto brand, will serve as a bridge connecting traditional finance and cryptocurrency, driving the development of tokenized stocks. A company spokesperson added that all global markets and tradable assets will be on-chain, and Coinbase is best positioned to lead this transformation. Tokenized stocks refer to digital tokens representing real-world shares of companies like Apple and Tesla, offering the advantage of being tradable across exchanges and instant settlement. Armstrong stated that Coinbase will currently sell stocks in a traditional manner, with back-end operations handled by Apex Fintech Solutions. This service is currently only available to a limited number of users but is planned to expand to all customers in the coming weeks. He predicts that the transition of assets to on-chain will begin in about two years and expressed his hope that Coinbase will become the first company to pay shareholder dividends in Bitcoin. (Fortune)
